---
title: |
  Data Analysis
subtitle: |
  Term paper social groups: Multivariate model
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: true
  eval: true
  message: true
---

# Setup

```{r}
#| label: setup

# To track computation time
start_time <- Sys.time()

# set width of console output
options(width = 80)


# Install and load required packages
p_required <- c(
  "tidyverse",
  "here",
  "haven",
  "sessioninfo",
  "brms",
  "bayesplot",
  "patchwork",
  "broom.mixed",
  "knitr",
  "ggpubr",
  "ggdag",
  "dagitty",
  "loo",
  "posterior",
  "modelsummary",
  "gt",
  "kableExtra"
)
packages <- rownames(installed.packages())
p_to_install <- p_required[!(p_required %in% packages)]
if (length(p_to_install) > 0) {
  install.packages(p_to_install)
}
sapply(p_required, require, character.only = TRUE)
rm(p_required, p_to_install, packages)

# Colours

col_1 <- "#FFAE42" # Orange Yellow
col_2 <- "#5D7860" # Dusky Green
col_3 <- "#BFABCC" # Grayish Lavender
col_4 <- "#D70040" # Carmine Red
chain_cols <- c(col_1, col_2, col_3, col_4)
```

```{r}
#| label: data-import
#| notes: importing the previously manipulated dataset
  
deservingness_data <- read.csv2(
  here("data", "02_processed", "processed_Dataset_DeConinck_et_al.csv")
)
```

# Priors

```{r}
#| label:  prior-set
#| notes: setting priors for all variables included in the model. Setting individual priors for the variables using different scales and used individual priors for all variances in the model. For prior justification see main paper.

get_prior(
  bf(
    mvbind(
      CARIN_Attitude,
      CARIN_Control,
      CARIN_Identity,
      CARIN_Need,
      CARIN_Reciprocity
    ) ~
      RWA_Total + V001 + Leeftijd3N + Diploma2 + V013
  ) +
    set_rescor(TRUE),
  data = deservingness_data,
  family = gaussian()
)

carin_priors <- c(
  prior(normal(3, 1), class = "Intercept", resp = "CARINAttitude"), # CARIN values (1-5 scale)
  prior(normal(3, 1), class = "Intercept", resp = "CARINControl"),
  prior(normal(3, 1), class = "Intercept", resp = "CARINIdentity"),
  prior(normal(3, 1), class = "Intercept", resp = "CARINNeed"),
  prior(normal(3, 1), class = "Intercept", resp = "CARINReciprocity"),

  prior(
    normal(0, 0.3),
    class = "b",
    coef = "RWA_Total",
    resp = "CARINAttitude"
  ), # RWA total value (1-7 scale)
  prior(normal(0, 0.3), class = "b", coef = "RWA_Total", resp = "CARINControl"),
  prior(
    normal(0, 0.3),
    class = "b",
    coef = "RWA_Total",
    resp = "CARINIdentity"
  ),
  prior(normal(0, 0.3), class = "b", coef = "RWA_Total", resp = "CARINNeed"),
  prior(
    normal(0, 0.3),
    class = "b",
    coef = "RWA_Total",
    resp = "CARINReciprocity"
  ),

  prior(normal(0, 0.15), class = "b", coef = "V013", resp = "CARINAttitude"), # political affiliation (0-10 scale)
  prior(normal(0, 0.15), class = "b", coef = "V013", resp = "CARINControl"),
  prior(normal(0, 0.15), class = "b", coef = "V013", resp = "CARINIdentity"),
  prior(normal(0, 0.15), class = "b", coef = "V013", resp = "CARINNeed"),
  prior(normal(0, 0.15), class = "b", coef = "V013", resp = "CARINReciprocity"),

  prior(
    normal(0, 0.5),
    class = "b",
    coef = "Leeftijd3N",
    resp = "CARINAttitude"
  ), # Age groups (1-3 scale)
  prior(
    normal(0, 0.5),
    class = "b",
    coef = "Leeftijd3N",
    resp = "CARINControl"
  ),
  prior(
    normal(0, 0.5),
    class = "b",
    coef = "Leeftijd3N",
    resp = "CARINIdentity"
  ),
  prior(normal(0, 0.5), class = "b", coef = "Leeftijd3N", resp = "CARINNeed"),
  prior(
    normal(0, 0.5),
    class = "b",
    coef = "Leeftijd3N",
    resp = "CARINReciprocity"
  ),

  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b", coef = "V001", resp = "CARINAttitude"), # Sex (Factor dummy)
  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b", coef = "V001", resp = "CARINControl"),
  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b", coef = "V001", resp = "CARINIdentity"),
  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b", coef = "V001", resp = "CARINNeed"),
  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b", coef = "V001", resp = "CARINReciprocity"),

  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b", coef = "Diploma2", resp = "CARINAttitude"), # Tertiary Degree (Factor Dummy)
  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b", coef = "Diploma2", resp = "CARINControl"),
  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b", coef = "Diploma2", resp = "CARINIdentity"),
  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b", coef = "Diploma2", resp = "CARINNeed"),
  prior(
    normal(0, 1),
    class = "b",
    coef = "Diploma2",
    resp = "CARINReciprocity"
  ),

  prior(exponential(3), class = "sigma", resp = "CARINAttitude"), #Standard Error
  prior(exponential(3), class = "sigma", resp = "CARINControl"),
  prior(exponential(3), class = "sigma", resp = "CARINIdentity"),
  prior(exponential(3), class = "sigma", resp = "CARINNeed"),
  prior(exponential(3), class = "sigma", resp = "CARINReciprocity"),

  prior(lkj(2), class = "rescor") # residual correlation
)
```

```{r}
#| label: fit-prior
#| notes: fitting priors for prior predictive checks using mvbind() for the CARIN criteria

fit_prior <- brm(
  bf(
    mvbind(
      CARIN_Attitude,
      CARIN_Control,
      CARIN_Identity,
      CARIN_Need,
      CARIN_Reciprocity
    ) ~ RWA_Total +
      V001 +
      Leeftijd3N +
      Diploma2 +
      V013
  ) +
    set_rescor(TRUE),
  data = deservingness_data,
  family = gaussian(),
  prior = carin_priors,
  sample_prior = "only",
  chains = 2,
  iter = 1000,
  seed = 2026,
)
```

# Prior Predictive Checks

```{r}
#| label: prior-predictive-checks
#| notes: creating prior predictive checks for all five CARIN criteria using density overlays, combining them into one prior predictive check graph and saving it

# Attitude

pp_1 <- pp_check(
  fit_prior,
  type = "dens_overlay",
  ndraws = 100,
  resp = "CARINAttitude"
) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5),
    labels = c("SD", "2", "3", "4", "SA"),
    limits = c(1, 5)
  ) +
  ggtitle("Attitude") +
  theme_minimal()

# Control

pp_2 <- pp_check(
  fit_prior,
  type = "dens_overlay",
  ndraws = 100,
  resp = "CARINControl"
) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5),
    labels = c("SD", "2", "3", "4", "SA"),
    limits = c(1, 5)
  ) +
  ggtitle("Control") +
  theme_minimal()

# Reciprocity

pp_3 <- pp_check(
  fit_prior,
  type = "dens_overlay",
  ndraws = 100,
  resp = "CARINReciprocity"
) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5),
    labels = c("SD", "2", "3", "4", "SA"),
    limits = c(1, 5)
  ) +
  ggtitle("Reciprocity") +
  theme_minimal()

# Identity

pp_4 <- pp_check(
  fit_prior,
  type = "dens_overlay",
  ndraws = 100,
  resp = "CARINIdentity"
) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5),
    labels = c("SD", "2", "3", "4", "SA"),
    limits = c(1, 5)
  ) +
  ggtitle("Identity") +
  theme_minimal()

# Need

pp_5 <- pp_check(
  fit_prior,
  type = "dens_overlay",
  ndraws = 100,
  resp = "CARINNeed"
) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5),
    labels = c("SD", "2", "3", "4", "SA"),
    limits = c(1, 5)
  ) +
  ggtitle("Need") +
  theme_minimal()

# save

pp_all <- (pp_1 | pp_2 | pp_3) / (pp_4 | pp_5)

ggsave(
  here("figures", "pp_density.png"),
  plot = pp_all,
  width = 14,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}
#| label: fit-model
# notes: fitting the multivariate model using brms() and mvbind() using previously specified priors

Sys.setenv(RSTUDIO = 1)

fit_multivar <- brm(
  bf(
    mvbind(
      CARIN_Attitude,
      CARIN_Control,
      CARIN_Identity,
      CARIN_Need,
      CARIN_Reciprocity
    ) ~ RWA_Total +
      V001 +
      Leeftijd3N +
      Diploma2 +
      V013
  ) +
    set_rescor(TRUE),
  data = deservingness_data,
  family = gaussian(),
  prior = carin_priors,
  chains = 4,
  iter = 4000,
  warmup = 1000,
  init = 0,
  seed = 2026,
  cores = 4,
  file = here("data", "03_model", "fit_multivar")
)
```

# Save models as .rds

```{r}
#| label: save-model-fit
# notes: saving the fitted model. allows for quick computation times by not needing to refit and recompile STAN each time when running the code

saveRDS(
  fit_multivar,
  here("data", "03_model", "fit_multivar.rds")
)
```

# MCMC

```{r}
#| label: fig-diag-multivar
#| fig-cap: "MCMC diagnostics: multivariate model: posterior samples on the left and traces on the right."
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 18
#| notes: conducting Markow Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) diagnostics to check chains

mcmc_multivar <- plot(fit_multivar, ask = FALSE)
```


```{r}
#| label: save-trace-plots
# Save trace plots as PNGs for appendix
# AI-use: used AI for base code structure for this and then adapted to fit_multivar model

variables(fit_multivar)

# Attitude

params_attitude <- c(
  "b_CARINAttitude_Intercept",
  "b_CARINAttitude_RWA_Total",
  "b_CARINAttitude_V001",
  "b_CARINAttitude_Leeftijd3N",
  "b_CARINAttitude_Diploma2",
  "b_CARINAttitude_V013"
)

trace_multivar_attitude <- mcmc_trace(
  as.array(fit_multivar),
  pars = params_attitude,
  np = nuts_params(fit_multivar)
) +
  ggtitle("Trace plots: Deservingness: Attitude Dimension") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(
  here("figures", "trace_multivar_attitude.png"),
  plot = trace_multivar_attitude,
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# Control

params_control <- c(
  "b_CARINControl_Intercept",
  "b_CARINControl_RWA_Total",
  "b_CARINControl_V001",
  "b_CARINControl_Leeftijd3N",
  "b_CARINControl_Diploma2",
  "b_CARINControl_V013"
)

trace_multivar_control <- mcmc_trace(
  as.array(fit_multivar),
  pars = params_control,
  np = nuts_params(fit_multivar)
) +
  ggtitle("Trace plots: Deservingness: Control Dimension ") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(
  here("figures", "trace_multivar_control.png"),
  plot = trace_multivar_control,
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# Identity

params_identity <- c(
  "b_CARINIdentity_Intercept",
  "b_CARINIdentity_RWA_Total",
  "b_CARINIdentity_V001",
  "b_CARINIdentity_Leeftijd3N",
  "b_CARINIdentity_Diploma2",
  "b_CARINIdentity_V013"
)

trace_multivar_identity <- mcmc_trace(
  as.array(fit_multivar),
  pars = params_identity,
  np = nuts_params(fit_multivar)
) +
  ggtitle("Trace plots: Deservingness: Identity Dimension") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(
  here("figures", "trace_multivar_identity.png"),
  plot = trace_multivar_identity,
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# Need

params_need <- c(
  "b_CARINNeed_Intercept",
  "b_CARINNeed_RWA_Total",
  "b_CARINNeed_V001",
  "b_CARINNeed_Leeftijd3N",
  "b_CARINNeed_Diploma2",
  "b_CARINNeed_V013"
)

trace_multivar_need <- mcmc_trace(
  as.array(fit_multivar),
  pars = params_need,
  np = nuts_params(fit_multivar)
) +
  ggtitle("Trace plots: Deservingness: Need Dimension") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(
  here("figures", "trace_multivar_need.png"),
  plot = trace_multivar_need,
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# Reciprocity

params_reciprocity <- c(
  "b_CARINReciprocity_Intercept",
  "b_CARINReciprocity_RWA_Total",
  "b_CARINReciprocity_V001",
  "b_CARINReciprocity_Leeftijd3N",
  "b_CARINReciprocity_Diploma2",
  "b_CARINReciprocity_V013"
)

trace_multivar_reciprocity <- mcmc_trace(
  as.array(fit_multivar),
  pars = params_reciprocity,
  np = nuts_params(fit_multivar)
) +
  ggtitle("Trace plots: Deservingness: Reciprocity Dimension") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(
  here("figures", "trace_multivar_reciprocity.png"),
  plot = trace_multivar_reciprocity,
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}
#| label: code-summary
#| tbl-cap: "summary statistics for mutlivariate model"
summary(fit_multivar)
```

# Posterior Predicitve Checks

```{r}
#| label: posterior-predictive-checks 
#| notes: conducting posterior predictive checks for all CARIN_ Variables

# Attitude

ppc_dens_multivar_attitude <- pp_check(
  fit_multivar,
  resp = "CARINAttitude",
  type = "dens_overlay",
  ndraws = 100
) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 6)
  ) +
  ggtitle("Attitude") +
  theme_minimal()

# Control

ppc_dens_multivar_control <- pp_check(
  fit_multivar,
  resp = "CARINControl",
  type = "dens_overlay",
  ndraws = 100
) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 6)
  ) +
  ggtitle("Control") +
  theme_minimal()

# Identity

ppc_dens_multivar_identity <- pp_check(
  fit_multivar,
  resp = "CARINIdentity",
  type = "dens_overlay",
  ndraws = 100
) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 6)
  ) +
  ggtitle("Identity") +
  theme_minimal()

# Need

ppc_dens_multivar_need <- pp_check(
  fit_multivar,
  resp = "CARINNeed",
  type = "dens_overlay",
  ndraws = 100
) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 6)
  ) +
  ggtitle("Need") +
  theme_minimal()

# Reciprocity

ppc_dens_multivar_reciprocity <- pp_check(
  fit_multivar,
  resp = "CARINReciprocity",
  type = "dens_overlay",
  ndraws = 100
) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 6)
  ) +
  ggtitle("Reciprocity") +
  theme_minimal()

# Complete Posterior Predictive Check plot

ppc_all <- (ppc_dens_multivar_attitude |
  ppc_dens_multivar_control |
  ppc_dens_multivar_identity) /
  (ppc_dens_multivar_need | ppc_dens_multivar_reciprocity)

ggsave(
  here("figures", "postpc_density.png"),
  plot = ppc_all,
  width = 14,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)
```

# Interpretation

```{r}
#| label: tbl-coef-multivar
#| tbl-cap: "Table of coefficients of the multivar model"

tidy(fit_multivar, conf.int = TRUE, conf.level = 0.95) |>
  filter(effect == "fixed") |>
  select(response, term, estimate, conf.low, conf.high) |>
  kable(
    digits = 2,
    col.names = c(
      "Response",
      "Term",
      "Posterior median",
      "Lower 95%",
      "Upper 95%"
    )
  )
```

# Predictive Probability Ribbon

```{r}
#| label: fig-ce
#| fig-cap: "Predicted probability of all CARIN criterias on RWA"

# Attitude

ce_attitude <- conditional_effects(
  fit_multivar,
  effects = "RWA_Total",
  resp = "CARINAttitude",
  method = "posterior_epred",
  prob = 0.95
)

ce_attitude_data <- ce_attitude[[1]]

ce_attitude_gg <- ggplot(ce_attitude_data, aes(x = RWA_Total, y = estimate__)) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = lower__, ymax = upper__),
    fill = col_1,
    alpha = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_line(color = col_1, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:7) +
  scale_y_continuous() +
  ggtitle("Attitude") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Right-Wing Authoritarianism (RWA_Total)",
    y = "Predicted Attitude score"
  )

# Control

ce_control <- conditional_effects(
  fit_multivar,
  effects = "RWA_Total",
  resp = "CARINControl",
  method = "posterior_epred",
  prob = 0.95
)

ce_control_data <- ce_control[[1]]

ce_control_gg <- ggplot(ce_control_data, aes(x = RWA_Total, y = estimate__)) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = lower__, ymax = upper__),
    fill = col_1,
    alpha = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_line(color = col_1, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:7) +
  scale_y_continuous() +
  ggtitle("Control") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Right-Wing Authoritarianism (RWA_Total)",
    y = "Predicted Control score"
  )

# Identity

ce_identity <- conditional_effects(
  fit_multivar,
  effects = "RWA_Total",
  resp = "CARINIdentity",
  method = "posterior_epred",
  prob = 0.95
)

ce_identity_data <- ce_identity[[1]]

ce_identity_gg <- ggplot(ce_identity_data, aes(x = RWA_Total, y = estimate__)) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = lower__, ymax = upper__),
    fill = col_1,
    alpha = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_line(color = col_1, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:7) +
  scale_y_continuous() +
  ggtitle("Identity") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Right-Wing Authoritarianism (RWA_Total)",
    y = "Predicted Identity score"
  )

# Need

ce_need <- conditional_effects(
  fit_multivar,
  effects = "RWA_Total",
  resp = "CARINNeed",
  method = "posterior_epred",
  prob = 0.95
)

ce_need_data <- ce_need[[1]]

ce_need_gg <- ggplot(ce_need_data, aes(x = RWA_Total, y = estimate__)) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = lower__, ymax = upper__),
    fill = col_1,
    alpha = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_line(color = col_1, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:7) +
  scale_y_continuous() +
  ggtitle("Need") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Right-Wing Authoritarianism (RWA_Total)",
    y = "Predicted Need score"
  )

# Reciprocity

ce_reciprocity <- conditional_effects(
  fit_multivar,
  effects = "RWA_Total",
  resp = "CARINReciprocity",
  method = "posterior_epred",
  prob = 0.95
)

ce_reciprocity_data <- ce_reciprocity[[1]]

ce_reciprocity_gg <- ggplot(
  ce_reciprocity_data,
  aes(x = RWA_Total, y = estimate__)
) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = lower__, ymax = upper__),
    fill = col_1,
    alpha = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_line(color = col_1, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:7) +
  scale_y_continuous() +
  ggtitle("Reciprocity") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Right-Wing Authoritarianism (RWA_Total)",
    y = "Predicted Reciprocity score"
  )


pred_prob_rib <- (ce_attitude_gg | ce_control_gg | ce_identity_gg) /
  (ce_need_gg | ce_reciprocity_gg)

ggsave(
  here("figures", "pred_prob_rib.png"),
  plot = pred_prob_rib,
  width = 14,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)
```


# Direct Posterior Probability Statements

```{r}
#| label: posterior-probs
#| notes: posterior probability statements displaying the probability that the effect of RWA on CARIN criteria is positive (more restrictive/less deserving)

post_add <- as_draws_df(fit_multivar)

p_attitude <- mean(post_add$b_CARINAttitude_RWA_Total > 0)

p_control <- mean(post_add$b_CARINControl_RWA_Total > 0)

p_identity <- mean(post_add$b_CARINIdentity_RWA_Total > 0)

p_need <- mean(post_add$b_CARINNeed_RWA_Total > 0)

p_reciprocity <- mean(post_add$b_CARINReciprocity_RWA_Total > 0)

tibble(
  hypothesis = c(
    "Effect on Attitude > 0",
    "Effect on Control > 0",
    "Effect on Identity > 0",
    "Effect on Need > 0",
    "Effect on Reciprocity > 0"
  ),
  posterior_probability = c(
    p_attitude,
    p_control,
    p_identity,
    p_need,
    p_reciprocity
  )
) |>
  kable(digits = 3)
```

# Loo diagnostic
```{r}
#| label: loo-multivar
# notes: loo statistics to compute pareto k statistics
loo_val <- loo(fit_multivar)
print(loo_val)
```

# Model summary

```{r}
#| label: model-sum
#| notes: summary table containing coefficients and 95% credible interval for Intercept, RWA, Sex, Age Group, Tertiary Degree, Pol. Affiliation
# AI-use: used ai to gain knoledge about the general option of creating summary tables like this and reformating the table with coefficients on top and credible interavals below. Did this to adapt to hardware limitations forcing to abandon the modelsummary() command, which my computer is not strong enough to compute without R freezing or crashing.

coef_tbl <- tidy(
  fit_multivar,
  effects = "fixed",
  conf.int = TRUE,
  conf.level = 0.95
)

term_levels <- c(
  "Intercept",
  "RWA",
  "Sex",
  "Age Group",
  "Tertiary Degree",
  "Pol. Affiliation"
)

response_levels <- c("Attitude", "Control", "Identity", "Need", "Reciprocity")

coef_clean <- coef_tbl |>
  mutate(
    response = str_remove(response, "^CARIN_?"),
    response = factor(response, levels = response_levels),
    term = recode(
      term,
      "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
      "Intercept" = "Intercept",
      "RWA_Total" = "RWA",
      "V001" = "Sex",
      "Leeftijd3N" = "Age Group",
      "Diploma2" = "Tertiary Degree",
      "V013" = "Pol. Affiliation"
    ),
    term = factor(term, levels = term_levels),
    estimate_ci = sprintf("%.2f [%.2f, %.2f]", estimate, conf.low, conf.high)
  ) |>
  arrange(term)

coef_wide <- coef_clean |>
  select(term, response, estimate_ci) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = response, values_from = estimate_ci) |>
  select(term, all_of(response_levels))

r2 <- bayes_R2(fit_multivar, ndraws = 200)

r2_row <- as.data.frame(r2) |>
  rownames_to_column("resp_raw") |>
  mutate(
    response = str_remove(resp_raw, "^R2CARIN_?"),
    r2_ci = sprintf("%.3f [%.3f, %.3f]", Estimate, Q2.5, Q97.5)
  ) |>
  select(response, r2_ci) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = response, values_from = r2_ci) |>
  mutate(term = "Bayes R²", .before = 1) |>
  select(term, all_of(response_levels))

final_table <- bind_rows(coef_wide, r2_row)

kable(
  final_table,
  col.names = c("Predictor", response_levels),
  align = "lccccc",
  caption = "Bayesian Multivariate Model: Posterior Medians [95% Credible Intervals] Predicting CARIN Deservingness Dimensions"
)

saveRDS(
  final_table,
  here("data", "03_model", "final_table.rds")
)
```

# Session Info

```{r}
#| label: session-info

session_info()
```


# Computation Time

```{r}
#| label: computation-time

end_time <- Sys.time()

computation_time <- end_time - start_time

message(paste(
  "Computation completed in:",
  round(as.numeric(computation_time, units = "secs"), 2),
  "seconds.
"
))
```
